name: golang-github-dnaeon-go-vcr-dev
title: golang-github-dnaeon-go-vcr-dev
summary: Record and replay your HTTP interactions for tests
description:
Record and replay your HTTP interactions for tests
go-vcr simplifies testing by recording your HTTP interactions and
replaying them in future runs in order to provide fast, deterministic
and accurate testing of your code.
